Package com.irurueta.units

Class AccelerationConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.AccelerationConverter
  • public class AccelerationConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does acceleration conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying acceleration measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_FOOT
      Number of meters in 1 foot.
      static double STANDARD_GRAVITY
      Standard gravity (g) on Earth.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      private AccelerationConverter()
      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double convert​(double input, AccelerationUnit inputUnit, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void convert​(Acceleration input, Acceleration output)
      Converts an acceleration instance to provided output acceleration unit.
      static void convert​(Acceleration acceleration, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updated an acceleration to requested output unit.
      static void convert​(Acceleration input, AccelerationUnit outputUnit, Acceleration result)
      Converts an acceleration to requested output unit.
      static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input, AccelerationUnit inputUnit, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Acceleration convertAndReturnNew​(Acceleration input, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration instance to requested output unit.
      static double feetPerSquaredSecondToMetersPerSquaredSecond​(double feetPerSquaredSecond)
      Converts provided feet per squared second value to meters per squared second.
      static double gravityToMetersPerSquaredSecond​(double g)
      Converts provided acceleration expressed in terms of standard gravity (9.8 m/s^2) to meters per squared second.
      static double metersPerSquaredSecondToFeetPerSquaredSecond​(double metersPerSquaredSecond)
      Converts provided meters per squared second value to feet per squared second.
      static double metersPerSquaredSecondToGravity​(double metersPerSquaredSecond)
      Converts provided acceleration expressed in meters per squared second to a value relative to the standard gravity (9.81 m/s^2).

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • STANDARD_GRAVITY

        public static final double STANDARD_GRAVITY
        Standard gravity (g) on Earth. This value is equivalent to 1G
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • METERS_PER_FOOT

        static final double METERS_PER_FOOT
        Number of meters in 1 foot.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Constructor Detail

      • AccelerationConverter

        private AccelerationConverter()
        Constructor. Prevents instantiation of helper class.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Acceleration input,
                           Acceleration output)
        Converts an acceleration instance to provided output acceleration unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input acceleration to be converted.
        output - output acceleration where result will be stored containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Acceleration convertAndReturnNew​(Acceleration input,
                                               AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an acceleration instance to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input acceleration to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted acceleration.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Acceleration acceleration,
                           AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updated an acceleration to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        acceleration - input acceleration to be converted and updated
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Acceleration input,
                           AccelerationUnit outputUnit,
                           Acceleration result)
        Converts an acceleration to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input acceleration to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - acceleration instance where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       AccelerationUnit inputUnit,
                                       AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - acceleration value.
        inputUnit - input acceleration unit
        outputUnit - output acceleration unit.
        Returns:
        converted acceleration value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             AccelerationUnit inputUnit,
                             AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
        Converts an acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - acceleration value.
        inputUnit - input acceleration unit.
        outputUnit - output acceleration unit.
        Returns:
        converted acceleration value.

      • feetPerSquaredSecondToMetersPerSquaredSecond

        public static double feetPerSquaredSecondToMetersPerSquaredSecond​(double feetPerSquaredSecond)
        Converts provided feet per squared second value to meters per squared second.
        Parameters:
        feetPerSquaredSecond - feet per squared second value.
        Returns:
        same acceleration converted to meters per squared second.

      • metersPerSquaredSecondToFeetPerSquaredSecond

        public static double metersPerSquaredSecondToFeetPerSquaredSecond​(double metersPerSquaredSecond)
        Converts provided meters per squared second value to feet per squared second.
        Parameters:
        metersPerSquaredSecond - meters per squared second value.
        Returns:
        same acceleration converted to feet per squared second.

      • gravityToMetersPerSquaredSecond

        public static double gravityToMetersPerSquaredSecond​(double g)
        Converts provided acceleration expressed in terms of standard gravity (9.8 m/s^2) to meters per squared second.
        Parameters:
        g - acceleration relative to standard gravity.
        Returns:
        same acceleration converted to meters per squared second.

      • metersPerSquaredSecondToGravity

        public static double metersPerSquaredSecondToGravity​(double metersPerSquaredSecond)
        Converts provided acceleration expressed in meters per squared second to a value relative to the standard gravity (9.81 m/s^2).
        Parameters:
        metersPerSquaredSecond - meters per squared second value.
        Returns:
        same acceleration expressed in relative terms to the standard gravity.
